result.title: What’s New in Google Accessibility | Episode 12 | American Sign Language
result.description:
Welcome back to another episode of What's New in Google Accessibility, a series where we share the latest product and feature updates that help make Google more accessible for everyone. In this episode, we'll tell you about updates on Android, Pixel, YouTube, Chrome Browser, and Gemini. 

Check out our full series at https://g.co/a11y/playlist 
To watch this video without American Sign Language (ASL) interpretation, please click here: https://youtu.be/s0M79zWRKps
To learn more, sign up for our accessibility newsletter at: https://g.co/a11y/news 

0:00 Introduction
0:25 Left and Right Ear Controls | Android  
1:01 Talkback Keyboard Shortcut | Android 
1:24 3-Button Navigation | Android 
1:55 Mouse Keys Feature | Android 
2:08 Voice Access | Android 
3:22 Guided Frame | Pixel 
4:31 Caret Browsing | Chrome 
5:20 Voice Boost | YouTube
5:45 Tips for the neurodivergent community| Gemini
7:11 Closing

#WhatsNewInGoogle #Accessibility #Google #a11y

result.title: Try on @nike City Edition jerseys with Search 🏀✨
result.description:
See the fit before you buy. Open Google, search for any team jersey, select the product, and tap “Try it on.”

(Visuals and morphing video created with #Veo.)

result.title: Search What You See: The Tech Behind The Magic | Made by Google Podcast S9E4
result.description:
You see an outfit you love, but it’s not just the jacket you want—it’s the entire vibe. What if you could search for it all at once? In this episode, host Rachid Finge sits down with Product Manager Harsh Kharbanda to explore the next generation of Circle to Search, now available on Pixel 10. Discover how new multi-object recognition allows you to search an entire scene, from deconstructing a full outfit with 'Find the Look' to identifying every fish in an aquarium. Learn how advanced AI is making it easier than ever to satisfy your curiosity and shop for the whole picture, not just a single piece.

01:28 – The Shift from Camera to Screen
07:18 – Introducing "Find the Look"
10:34 – The Virtual "Try it On" Tool
14:43 – Beyond Fashion: Skincare, Design, and Facts

#AI #CircleToSearch #MadeByGoogle #TechPodcast 

Subscribe to our Channel: https://www.youtube.com/google
Find us on X: https://twitter.com/google
Watch us on TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@google
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/google
Join us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Google
